title: ElytraHud3
description: Aviation-style flight HUD for elytras (Fabric & NeoForge) — speed, altitude, artificial horizon, compass. Do a Barrel Roll compatible.
body:
# ElytraHud3

This is an attempt to keep one of my favorite mods alive, updated for the 26.x series of Minecraft, and the very latest minecraft versions as they come out.

An aviation-style flight HUD for Minecraft elytras. While you're gliding, a compact corner
instrument cluster shows your airspeed, altitude, vertical speed, an artificial horizon, a
compass, and your elytra's durability.

- **Imperial or metric** units (toggle; imperial by default).
- **Do a Barrel Roll compatible** — the artificial horizon stays correct while you bank.
- **Fabric and NeoForge**, Minecraft 26.1.x and 26.2.
- Pure Java, lightweight (~33 KB), no Kotlin/FLK/YACL runtime dependencies.
- Every element is individually toggleable (config via ModMenu on Fabric or the NeoForge mods list).

## Credits
Original design by Microsoft for Microsoft Flight Simulator; Derived from elytrahud-rework by inorganic (MIT); flight-HUD design inspired by neo-elytra-hud (CC0);
roll compatibility via Do a Barrel Roll's public API.
